title: EvenOrOdd
description: This modpack is made to see how many mods you can add while using Sodium (and friends), Immersive Portals, and THREE different TARDIS mods without crashing... Warning: UNSTABLE
body:
A modpack centered around **Immersive Portals**, **Sodium** (for playability) and **TARDIS** mods. 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Yes.. **MULTIPLE** TARDIS mods

</details>

### Exploration

Important to note, the generation is vanilla! Yet, there are many new structures and villages look nothing like normal. Find HUGE underground bunkers FILLED with loot and enjoy YUNG's Better.. basically everything.

### Transportation

There are many ways of moving around in this modpack. Be it by trains, jetpack, plane, car, airship, watership, waystone, walking or **TARDIS**... The choice is YOURS!

### Technology

Im a big fan of automation so technology mods are a MUST, this pack contains **AE2**, **Modern Industrialization** **Create**, **Ad Astra**, **CC:T**, **Flux Networks** and most importantly **K9**!


## PAQ

Possibly asked questions

### What is the purpose of this pack?

This pack serves as a way for me to not lose my pack if i mess it up (by adding more mods) and easily sharing it with friends.


### How does the pack run?

This runs fairly ok but has only been tested on a beefy computer. It is not recommended to play on a low-end PC.

### Should you play it?

This pack is higly **UNTESTED** and will probably crash at some point. There are a few optimisation mods but things **WILL** lag a bit when loading stuff. It will get updates as I play with it and make it crash myself. If this sounds appealing then go for it! What is there to loose?

### Can this be used on a server?

Yes! All you need to do is make a fabric server with the same loader version, then add all the mods from your instance's mods folder execpt Distant Horizons.
